headline.text: L3 ML1 flow wrap failed *multiple* water tests — adhesive gaps found, new roll installed, retests passed.

summary: Three quality events across plants: L3 flow wrap seal integrity failures (resolved), L2 PTL temperature fault (2-hour line down, sensor replaced), and L1 chiller compressor requiring manual restarts. One facility flag: L1 walk-in cooler door gap allows cold air escape. One pest control device needs replacement.

quality.title: S3 chiller 2nd compressor not auto-starting
quality.summary: Second compressor on S3 glycol chiller requires force-start each cycle; when it fails to start, temperatures climb and risk melted chocolate exiting Tunnel 2; no alarm or fault indication to operators.
quality.status: Open — manually force-started during shift; compressors cycling normally once restarted, but root cause of auto-start failure unresolved.

quality.title: Walk-in cooler door gap — cold air escaping
quality.summary: Gap along one side of walk-in cooler sliding door allows cold air to escape; door seal needs repair to maintain proper temperature control.
quality.status: Open — flagged for maintenance repair; no indication cooler is out of temp spec at this time.

quality.title: ML2 PTL temperature fault — bad sensor
quality.summary: Product tank temperature dropped, PTL overflowed and stopped sending to temper unit; expansion tank pressure high (19.7); line down ~2 hours while maintenance replaced faulty sensor.
quality.status: Resolved — sensor replaced, chocolate re-tempered, depositing resumed at 18:12 MT.

quality.title: Flow wrap water test failures — adhesive gaps
quality.summary: Multiple water test failures on ML1 2nd shift traced to gaps in adhesive on flow wrap roll; production adjusted, maintenance inspected, new roll installed, three subsequent tests passed.
quality.status: Resolved — new roll installed, retests passed, periodic testing continuing through shift per QA.

sanitation.title: Pest control device #18 damaged
sanitation.summary: Pest control device #18 is bent and out of shape, needs replacement to maintain pest monitoring coverage.
sanitation.status: Open — flagged for pest control vendor replacement.

sanitation.title: ML3 CIL roller chocolate buildup after short run
sanitation.summary: Significant chocolate accumulation on CIL roller caused line stop after only a few hours of operation; maintenance confirmed roller was cleaned and reinstalled on 3rd shift, but buildup recurred quickly.
sanitation.status: Resolved — roller cleaned, line restarted within 10 minutes; root cause of rapid re-buildup unclear.

opportunities.text: Add S3 glycol chiller compressor auto-start behavior to daily startup checks and request controls review — based on today's ongoing issue where 2nd compressor fails to auto-start with no alarm, creating unmonitored temperature risk.

Review ML3 cleaning roller cleaning verification method and post-clean inspection protocol — based on today's excessive chocolate buildup on CIL roller recurring after only a few hours despite confirmed cleaning and reinstall.
Consider adding flow wrap adhesive and seal integrity inspection to ML1 startup checklist — based on today's repeated water test failures traced to gaps in the adhesive on the flow wrap roll.
